summary: Round 2 re-review of CrashReportActivity.kt at commit 4933c4d. CR4-1-L3 is cleanly resolved via a precise KDoc on the launching field. The new FLAG_SECURE call and the switch to applicationContext for Toasts are correctly implemented and introduce no new concerns. CR4-1-L1 and CR4-1-L2 deferrals are documented and acceptable for this task.

notes.CR4-1-L3: Resolved. KDoc at lines 59-67 explains the mutableStateOf choice vs plain var from task hints, notes Compose recomposition of the button's enabled state, and justifies why non-rememberSaveable is acceptable (ActivityResultRegistry survives rotation). Accurate and self-contained.
notes.FLAG_SECURE: Line 85: window.setFlags(FLAG_SECURE, FLAG_SECURE) is set before setContent in onCreate, which is the correct ordering — the flag is applied before any surface is drawn. Uses the standard WindowManager.LayoutParams constant. Comment on line 84 accurately states intent (keep crash screen out of Recents/OEM screen-capture). No new concerns.
notes.applicationContext-toasts: Lines 111 and 114: Toast.makeText now uses applicationContext instead of `this`. This is the recommended pattern and avoids leaking the activity through the Toast's view. The underlying Toast will still display correctly since Toast does not require an Activity context for rendering. No new concerns.
notes.deferrals: CR4-1-L1 (File.delete on Main) and CR4-1-L2 (LOGS_DIR/CRASH_LOG constant extraction) deferrals are sound: the recovery path is already on a tombstone-process cost budget where a single sub-millisecond filesDir delete is negligible, and the constants live only in this file until a third call site appears.
